creator: conrad@th.physik.uni-bonn.de
text:
On Wed, 21 Feb 2001, Jacques A. Vidrine wrote:

> No, it does not use a hard-coded path.  See
>    ${PREFIX}/Acrobat4/Reader/intellinux/app-defaults/AcroRead
> You can change lprCommand there.

This is precisely what I wrote in my email!

I suggested that 'make install' should change
${PREFIX}/Acrobat4/Reader/intellinux/app-defaults/AcroRead
accordingly
>
> For some reason, you can't override that setting in ${HOME}/.acrorc.
>
> Cheers,
>
ciao
	Jan
